name: Ifanês (Mirandese septentrional)
notes: Ifanês subdialect of Mirandese, spoken in Ifanes (Infantes) in the northern part of Terra de Miranda. Differs from central Mirandese in: (1) monophthongization of -iê- → -e- (not -i- like Sendinês); (2) -uô- is sporadic, not systematically reduced. Noted in Convenção footnote 7 and Vasconcellos (1900).
